title: Pierogi Ruskie (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Make dough with flour, egg, sour cream.
Mix with cheese and caramelized onion.
Serve with butter and sour cream.
Also added a pinch of garlic powder and a drizzle of melted butter.
Also added a splash of sour cream and topped with fried onions.

source_review.text: Just like grandma's! Added a pinch of salt and a dash of pepper. Also added a splash of sour cream and topped with fried onions.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances flavor and adds texture to the dish

changes_made.to_text: Also added a splash of sour cream and topped with fried onions.

source_review.text: Added bacon and cheddar cheese. Also added a pinch of garlic powder and a drizzle of melted butter.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile of the dish with additional ingredients
